text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm out shopping when I catch sight<n>of a younger
Umamusume with what<n>looks like a Tracen
student.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wooow, what a cute bow! ♪ I want<n>the same
one!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks! ☆ It's one of my<n>faves! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Why don't we look for one together?!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Not this one... or this one. It's not<n>here...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well... what about this one? Don't<n>you think the
frills are super cute?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
B-b-but I want the one you have... I<n>wanna be as
cute as you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can be cute wearing other bows!<n>♪ You over
there! You think so too,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
See? ☆ Everyone's cute in their own<n>special
way! That means you too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: R-really? I'm cute in my own way?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course! ♪ Let's find you your very<n>own style
of cute—one even I can't<n>copy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! So, like... like... which one do<n>you think
is my type?!
choice_data_list: Something with an intellectual look might be good.
Something super energetic would be good!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah! ☆ I bet that'll look super cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In fact, let's not stop at a bow. Let's<n>throw in a
trendy pair of glasses too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I want glasses too! I wanna be<n>cute, after
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Looks like you've awoken to your<n>inner
cuteness! ☆ Let's keep getting<n>cuter and cuter! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two head toward a<n>variety store in
search of greater<n>cuteness!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think that would be really cute!<n>♪ Like a
cool aqua blue, or a cheerful<n>yellow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do I do?! Everything's<n>starting to look
cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Reeeeally rack your brains! ☆ You're<n>extra
super-duper cute when you're<n>trying so hard to
get cuter! ♪

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks! You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two enjoy the rest of their<n>shopping,
carefully scrutinizing all of<n>their options.
